project.project_title: Discovery Engine - eight-stage cross-disciplinary research-question discovery apparatus
project.source_strategy: Use sources to strengthen cross-field mechanism transfer and academic-stage dependency. Sources should not merely answer a query; they should help move a mechanism from one field into another while marking downstream stages stale when upstream assumptions change.
project.distinctiveness_component_to_build: Cross-field mechanism transfer and dependency stale-state demonstrator
project.distinctiveness_component_operation: Move one seed research question through Observatory, Scanner, Bridge, Cross-Pollination, XPol fit pressure, Incubator, and Forge; then alter an upstream premise and show downstream methodology, analysis, or writing stages becoming review-required.
project.distinctiveness_component_output: Transfer route, rejected false analogy, draftable research object, stale-stage flags, and revised downstream task list.
project.acceptance_test: A reviewer can see why this project could not be swapped with another page without losing the mechanism.
project.best_improvement: Capture a live Nexus walkthrough showing both halves of the system: cross-field mechanism discovery and upstream/downstream academic-pipeline dependency control.
project.build_status: file-backed proof build; needs live reviewer capture for stronger public demonstration
